Exception
When you are doing a
webinar on which you will
open your cart
Then I’ll run the webinar 5 or 7 days
prior to Cart Close date

webinars the two days before Cart
Open

Those who attend can buy on
the webinar

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 8
How Long Should
Registration Be Open?
We Have Two Opposite Factors Pulling
On Us
When it comes right down to it,
getting people to attend is
more important
So we usually want only 3 – 5
days in the Webinar
Registration Period
22
23
24
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 9 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 9
Ideal:
3 days
The longer the Webinar Registration
Period, the lower your attendance
That’s one reason why focusing
on the webinar topic for the
week before registration opens
is key
We talk about the webinar
topic without mentioning the
webinar
